title: Workload widget: combine items & subitems

posts.author: Shadi (Shadi)
posts.cookedHtml:
Dear community,

I saw a use case where the company creates items for activities, linked to entire teams with subitems which divide the activities per person. They are using the workload widget on their dashboards. In the workload widget you have to choose: or you can show the items or the subitems.

I want to request to show both. This would create a clear overview of the entire situation.

workload908×573 26.2 KB

Thank you in advance for consideration.

Regards,
Shadi
